description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 9th; Slot head; Price 73,500 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION A character wearing this helm may teleport three times per day, instantly transporting himself and objects he might be carrying on his person to a designated destination, exactly as if he had cast the spell of the same name. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, teleport; Cost 36,750 gp.
